Family, Maternal & Child Health (FMCH) | Contra Costa Health
RESOURCES
Safely Surrendered Baby Law
No- or Low-Cost Dental Clinics for Kids
Family Health Toll-Free Line
800-696-9644
For help getting health services for you and/or your children.
FMCH Programs are dedicated to promoting the health and well-being of families and children through innovative partnerships with families, community members, county programs, and community-based organizations. To accomplish this mission, our work involves collecting and analyzing data to:
Identify high priority needs,
Develop, implement, and evaluate programs designed to improve health outcomes, and
Provide training and technical assistance to groups throughout the county on issues of perinatal health.
To submit a request for FMCH programs and services, please click the link below and complete the referral form.
Referral Form
